source_intake_record.raw_question_text: In the amplifier circuit shown in figure, given the transistor \( VT \) with \( \beta = 60 \), \( U_{BEQ} = 0.7V \), \( R_P = 0 \sim 100k\Omega \), \( R_{B1} = 10k\Omega \), \( R_{B2} = 10k\Omega \), \( R_C = 2k\Omega \), \( R_L = 2k\Omega \), \( R_E = 1k\Omega \), and \( U_{CC} = 12V \). Adjusting the resistor \( R_P \) to 20k\Omega, the emitter voltage \( V_{EQ} = \) ________ V.
